name: Bref
description: Bref — PHP runtime for AWS Lambda, enabling serverless deployment of Laravel, Symfony, and plain PHP applications.

seo.title: Bref — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Bref: Bref — PHP runtime for AWS Lambda, enabling serverless deployment of Laravel, Symfony, and plain PHP applications.

when_to_use: Deploying Laravel apps to AWS Lambda with Bref PHP runtime
Serverless PHP functions triggered by API Gateway or SQS
Symfony applications on Lambda without server provisioning
Migrating PHP monoliths to pay-per-request serverless billing
Running PHP workers on Lambda for async queue processing

pros: Runs Laravel and Symfony on Lambda
cons: Operational model is a mental shift
review.verdict: The cleanest path to serverless PHP on AWS, as long as cold starts fit your workload.
review.best_for: Laravel and Symfony teams wanting AWS-native serverless hosting
review.not_for: Low-latency PHP apps or teams uncomfortable with AWS ops

lock_in.reason: OSS PHP Lambda runtime, AWS tied
